items.statcast_observation: Salvador Perez produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.8 mph at a 17.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Houston Astros, KC 8, HOU 10. Michael Massey led the night, 2-4 | 2B, 2 RBI, 2 R in the latest Royals game. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.8 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Astros Recap
